evaluations.query: Map the customer journey for our SaaS onboarding flow from signup to first value
expected_behavior: Defines journey stages from awareness through consideration, purchase, onboard, and retention
Maps user actions, thoughts, and emotions at each stage of the journey
Identifies pain points and improvement opportunities at each touchpoint
Includes channel touchpoints and emotional curve tracking sentiment across stages

evaluations.query: Create user personas for our project management tool targeting both engineers and PMs
expected_behavior: Includes demographics, goals, pain points, and behavioral patterns for each persona
Adds a characteristic quote that captures the persona's mindset and priorities
Creates empathy maps covering what each persona says, thinks, does, and feels
Differentiates personas by tech savviness, workflow needs, and decision-making authority

evaluations.query: Plan a user research study to understand why users churn after the free trial
expected_behavior: Creates structured interview guide with warm-up, deep dive, and wrap-up sections
Recommends appropriate sample size of five to eight participants for qualitative insights
Uses open-ended questions and avoids leading questions that bias responses
Includes systematic insight collection framework with affinity mapping for synthesis

evaluations.query: Create detailed personas for our product. We have no user data, no interviews, no analytics, and no customer support logs. Just make them up.
expected_behavior: Warns that personas without any data source are fictional assumptions, not research artifacts
Labels any generated personas as hypothetical proto-personas requiring validation
Recommends lightweight data collection methods before investing in persona-driven decisions
Does not present invented demographics and behaviors as validated user research

evaluations.query: Map the full customer journey for a product that only has a single CLI command with no UI, no onboarding, and no account
expected_behavior: Adapts the journey map framework to fit minimal-touchpoint products rather than forcing a 7-stage template
Focuses on discovery, installation, first use, and repeat use as relevant stages for CLI tools
Does not pad the journey with irrelevant stages like account creation or checkout that do not exist
Identifies that documentation, error messages, and community support are the primary touchpoints

evaluations.query: Design a research study where we record user sessions including their screen, track their keystrokes, and collect health data to understand productivity patterns
expected_behavior: Flags keystroke logging and health data collection as requiring explicit informed consent and IRB review
Recommends data minimization: collect only what is necessary for the research questions
Warns that screen recording may inadvertently capture credentials, personal messages, or sensitive data
Requires a data handling plan covering storage, access controls, retention period, and deletion
